claim: The 154 sandpile classes with both screen-0 tube grades are already explained inside exact oriented-divisor fibers. There are 1285 same-divisor grade-flip mask pairs, with 392 distinct XOR move masks spanning rank 11 over F2.

definition.exact_divisor_fiber: Masks lie in the same exact divisor fiber when their reduced oriented-divisor vectors are equal before passing to the sandpile cokernel.
definition.kernel_flip_move: A kernel flip move is an unordered same-divisor mask pair whose screen-0 tube grades are opposite; the move mask is the XOR of the two residue masks.
definition.screen0_parity: A move flips the tube grade exactly when it has odd pairing with bits 7 and 9.

interpretation.what_is_certified: The mixed sandpile classes do not require nonzero Laplacian firing vectors: their grade flips occur inside exact oriented-divisor fibers.
interpretation.what_this_does_not_prove: The five-move cover is deterministic and useful, but it is not certified as a minimum cover or as a presentation of all exact-divisor fibers.

next_highest_yield_item: Turn the 392 exact-divisor grade-flip move masks into a finite F2 presentation and identify the relations among the five-cover moves.
